zh.lifeSummary: 當Jutta von Brandenburg於1275年出生在德國布藍登波格布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾時，她的父親Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg29歲，母親Judith von Henneberg-Coburg28歲。她於1303年與Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年5月9日在海因里希_普洛文次 薩辛藍德可萊斯 維騰格享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jutta von Brandenburg于1275年出生在德国布藍登波格布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾时，她的父亲Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg29岁，母亲Judith von Henneberg-Coburg28岁。她于1303年与Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年5月9日在海因里希_普洛文次 薩辛藍德可萊斯 維騰格享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Jutta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Judith  , also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Jutta von Brandenburg was born in 1275, in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germany, her father, Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg, was 29 and her mother, Judith von Henneberg-Coburg, was 28. She married Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg in 1303. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 9 May 1328, in Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Prussia, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jutta von Brandenburg est née en 1275, à Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Allemagne, son père, Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Judith von Henneberg-Coburg, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg en 1303. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1328, à Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Prusse, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jutta von Brandenburg 1275 in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg 29 und ihre Mutter Judith von Henneberg-Coburg 28. Sie hat 1303 Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1328 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta von Brandenburg è nata il nel 1275 nel Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germania, sua padre, Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Judith von Henneberg-Coburg, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg nel 1303. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 9 maggio 1328, nel Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jutta von Brandenburg(이)가 1275년 독일 브랜덴버그 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith von Henneberg-Coburg(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1303년 Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 5월 9일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 작센 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta von Brandenburg nasceu em 1275, em Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Judith von Henneberg-Coburg, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg em 1303. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1328, em Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jutta von Brandenburg родилась в 1275 г. в местности брэнденбург ан дир хавел, брэнденбург, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith von Henneberg-Coburg, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg в 1303 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 мая 1328 г. в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, провинз сачсен, Пруссия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jutta von Brandenburg nació en 1275, en Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemania, su papá, Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Judith von Henneberg-Coburg, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Rudolf I. Herzog von Sachsen-Wittenberg en 1303. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1328, en Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, a la edad de 53 años.
